hero.title: Work with MIGMA from anywhere in the world
hero.description: Join the MIGMA Global Partner Program and collaborate with us as a Global Independent Contractor Partner.
hero.apply_button: Apply to Become a Global Partner

benefits.title: Work with freedom and earn in USD
benefits.description: Join a global team of talented professionals and enjoy the benefits of working remotely with competitive compensation.
benefits.benefit1_desc: Competitive compensation paid in US Dollars, regardless of your location.
benefits.benefit2_desc: Complete freedom to work from anywhere. All you need is a reliable internet connection.
benefits.benefit3_desc: You must have a valid business entity (CNPJ, NIF or equivalent) to invoice us.

who_is_it_for.title: Who is the MIGMA Global Partner Program for?
who_is_it_for.description: We are looking for ambitious people and companies who want to work with MIGMA as independent contractors and help us expand globally.
who_is_it_for.point1: You live in Brazil, Portugal, Angola, Mozambique, Cape Verde or any other country.
who_is_it_for.point2: You have (or are able to obtain) a valid business or tax registration (CNPJ, NIF or equivalent).
who_is_it_for.point3: You are comfortable working with clients, sales, service, operations or consulting.
who_is_it_for.point4: You are open to being paid per result, commission or project.
who_is_it_for.point5: You like the idea of growing with an international ecosystem instead of a traditional job.
who_is_it_for.point6: You like to receive payments in USD.
who_is_it_for.point7: You enjoy working with the United States visa process.

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.description: Join our global team in four simple steps
how_it_works.step1_desc: Submit your application with your professional details.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Our team reviews your experience and qualifications.
how_it_works.step3_desc: A brief call to discuss your fit and opportunities.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Get set up with our systems and start working.

form.title: Apply to become a MIGMA Global Partner
form.description: Tell us more about you, your experience and why you want to work with MIGMA. If your profile matches what we are looking for, you will receive an email to schedule an interview.
form.cv_dropzone_text: Click to upload or drag and drop
form.file_too_large: File too large. Please reduce the file size to under 3MB. Current size: {{size}}MB
form.info_accurate_label: I confirm that all the information provided is true and accurate. *
form.marketing_consent_label: I agree to receive relevant updates and opportunities from MIGMA by email.

wizard.has_business_label: Do you have a valid business or tax registration (CNPJ, NIF or equivalent)? *

wizard.visa_experience_label: Do you have experience with U.S. visa processes? *
wizard.client_experience_label: Do you have experience working with clients, sales or business development? *
wizard.client_experience_desc_label: Please briefly describe your experience working with clients, sales or business development *
wizard.why_migma_label: Why do you want to work with MIGMA as a Global Partner? *
wizard.contractor_acknowledgement: I understand that this is not an employment offer and that the collaboration with MIGMA is as an independent contractor. *

role_options.any_role_where_migma_believes_i_am_a_goo: Any role where MIGMA believes I am a good fit

testimonials.title: What our partners say
testimonials.description: Join a community of talented professionals who have found success working with MIGMA as Global Partners.
testimonials.testimonial1_text: Working with MIGMA as a Global Partner has been an incredible experience. The flexibility and support are unmatched.
testimonials.testimonial2_text: The opportunity to work remotely while earning in USD has transformed my career. Highly recommend joining the program.
testimonials.testimonial3_text: MIGMA's Global Partner Program offers the perfect balance of independence and collaboration.
testimonials.testimonial4_text: As a contractor, I appreciate the professional structure and competitive compensation MIGMA provides.
testimonials.testimonial5_text: The onboarding process was smooth, and the team is always available to help. Great experience overall.
testimonials.testimonial6_text: Working with MIGMA has opened doors to exciting projects I wouldn't have access to otherwise.
testimonials.testimonial7_text: The freedom to work from anywhere combined with USD payments makes this program ideal for global professionals.
testimonials.testimonial8_text: MIGMA values quality work and provides the resources needed to deliver exceptional results.
testimonials.testimonial9_text: Being part of MIGMA's global network has expanded my professional horizons significantly.

cta.title: Ready to join our global team?
cta.description: Start your journey as a MIGMA Global Partner and work with freedom, earn in USD, and collaborate with a world-class team.
